title: Social Media Post Absurd Purple Mofumofu Pachinko Machine
sourceTitle: Social Media Post Absurd Purple Mofumofu Pachinko Machine

imagePrompts.prompt: A hyper-detailed Japanese pachinko machine front view designed as a surreal contemporary-art parody, glossy black and metallic purple body with intense magenta-violet LED illumination, sparkling chrome trim, jewel-like plastic molding, and multiple pink paw-print emblems embedded throughout the frame. The central display features a dramatic middle-aged Japanese woman with short curly auburn-brown hair, wearing a dark kimono, pointing directly toward the viewer in a confrontational heroic pose against a cosmic purple lightning-and-nebula background. Her face is intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur, and 3 additional smaller portraits of the same woman also appear around the machine with the same blurred-face treatment, for a total of 4 blurred human portraits. Include 3 plush panda heads tucked into the machine layout along the left and right sides. At the very top, large glittering title text reads "CR 岡安モフモフ" with a smaller subtitle beneath it reading "もふもふは、正義。" On the left of the center screen, add the phrase "今日もモフって生きていく。" Across the woman’s chest area, place a black brushstroke label with gold lettering reading "岡安モフセフ". On the right side, create a bright bonus panel with a paw icon and the words "モフモフ RUSH". Near the lower center, add a circular button-like emblem reading "モフモフ CHANCE". At the bottom center, create a large glowing control button labeled "モフモフ" with a pink paw icon. In the lower right display area, add a smaller inset image of the same pointing woman and handwritten-style text reading "もふるか もふられるか…" The overall mood should feel absurd, gaudy, overdesigned, kitschy, and funny, like a fake pachinko machine celebrating fluffy animals and melodramatic spectacle, rendered as a high-resolution product-style front-facing photograph with sharp reflections, saturated purple highlights, and dense decorative detail.
